calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Landes for and with (trustor/petitioner) Arthur Ritchie.

The Court stated that this is a petition to modify a trust, that it has consents from every beneficiary and contingent beneficiary, that under P.C. 15403 they are entitled to do so, that the issue is if a Special Needs Trust (SNT) is appropriate/legal at this point for Anthony who is not receiving public benefits, that it does not meet the qualifications, that in granting the petition the court makes no determination regarding the SNT and that it is nice to see that reconciliations have happened. Mr. Landes stated that the son is alive and if by chance he pre-deceases and Anthony needs assistance they would not want to take a chance. The Court stated that there are other ways of dealing with it. The Court granted the petition for modification of the irrevocable trust (subject to review of the order) and will insert language limiting what the court's approval is.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Siu. (Not Reported)
